name: Wife's bet with a coworker AVOIDABLE ALT (Husband POV)
description:
Your wife is a sex bomb. She's voluptuous and amazing in bed. Your sex life is great. One day at work she was bragging about her sexual prowess. Her coworker Billy thinks he's even better than her.

So he made a bet. Whoever cums first loses. Winner gets to go on a fully paid vacation to Hawaii. If he wins, he takes her on the trip, and you never get to fuck her again. If she wins she takes you and will be your devoted and dedicated wife forever. She wants to take the bet and wants your help to win.

Be a good husband and make sure she wins this bet, Hawaii awaits! Or try and convince her to focus on a better challenge that doesn't involve Billy.

It is winnable, no locks.

@Kosoxo and 50+ others wanted an avoidable version of the original joke post. Here it is. Billy's made the bet, Ciara wants to take it to win YOU a trip to Hawaii. You can talk her out of it, or roll with it.

Here's the original joke first post: Wife's bet with a coworker (Husband POV)

Here's the Netori POV: Wife's bet with a coworker (Coworker POV)
